testnet.notes: Republished 2026-06-01 with the redesigned lender: mock_lender now holds principal (1:1, never spent on yield) and yield_reserve (admin-funded buffer) separately, so redeem returns principal always + yield best-effort and never aborts. spending_vault routes through lender_adapter (the testnet->mainnet seam). Fund the yield buffer via mock_lender::fund_yield (gated by AdminCap). Supersedes package 0xc7073f8c... (commingled-reserve design).
